title: Tuesday morning with the money already in
subtitle: A short guided visualisation for placing yourself inside a completely ordinary day where wealth is already present.
excerpt: A visualisation practice from Day 26 of the MONEY program. Use to practise wealth as the background of a normal day rather than a dramatic arrival.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when wealth still feels like a future event rather than the texture of a current life. The scene is deliberately unremarkable.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation from Day 26 of the MONEY program. The scene is a Tuesday morning. Nothing dramatic happens in it. That is the entire point: wealth is ordinary here, not an event.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take two slow breaths.
It is Tuesday morning. You wake up in your house — the one you live in when you are wealthy. Not a mansion, just a house. Yours. You get up slowly. The kitchen is quiet.
You make something to drink. You're not thinking about money this morning — there is nothing to think about. It's in. It's there. The accounts are healthy. You know this the way you know your name.

You sit with your drink. Maybe you look out of a window. There is a quality of steadiness in your body: shoulders down, jaw loose. You have things to do today. You are looking forward to some of them.
This is Tuesday. This is ordinary. The money is just the background.
Stay with the scene for a moment. Then open your eyes.
Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
